trans-unit.source: Exercise 3: Identifying Affected Health Facilities and Schools – Aina Adds More Layers
trans-unit.target: Exercise 3: Identifying Affected Health Facilities and Schools – Aina Adds More Layers

trans-unit.source: This exercise can be used in online and presence training.
trans-unit.target: This exercise can be used in online and presence training.

trans-unit.source: It can be done as a follow-along exercise or individually as a self-study.
trans-unit.target: It can be done as a follow-along exercise or individually as a self-study.

trans-unit.source: This exercise is part of the [Madagascar Anticipatory Action Cyclon Analysis Exercise Track](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Exercise_tracks/en_mdg_aa_cyclones.html)
trans-unit.target: This exercise is part of the [Madagascar Anticipatory Action Cyclon Analysis Exercise Track](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Exercise_tracks/en_mdg_aa_cyclones.html)

trans-unit.source: :::{card} :class-card: sd-border-1 sd-shadow-none __Aim of the exercise:__ Aina, the GIS expert at the Malagasy Red Cross (CRM), is preparing for the upcoming cyclone season. She wants to improve her team’s ability to act quickly once a storm is forecasted by automating key analyses in QGIS. These include estimating exposed populations, identifying impacted services like health and education, and assessing whether health posts can be reached from key warehouses within a critical 10-hour window. The goal is to prepare an end-to-end analysis and visualization workflow that can support fast, data-driven anticipatory action before a cyclone makes landfall. ^^^
trans-unit.target: :::{card} :class-card: sd-border-1 sd-shadow-none __Aim of the exercise:__ Aina, the GIS expert at the Malagasy Red Cross (CRM), is preparing for the upcoming cyclone season. She wants to improve her team’s ability to act quickly once a storm is forecasted by automating key analyses in QGIS. These include estimating exposed populations, identifying impacted services like health and education, and assessing whether health posts can be reached from key warehouses within a critical 10-hour window. The goal is to prepare an end-to-end analysis and visualization workflow that can support fast, data-driven anticipatory action before a cyclone makes landfall. ^^^

trans-unit.source: Take the time to familiarise yourself with the exercise and the provided material.
trans-unit.target: Take the time to familiarise yourself with the exercise and the provided material.

trans-unit.source: Prepare a white-board. It can be either a physical whiteboard, a flip-chart, or a digital whiteboard (e.g. Miro board) where the participants can add their findings and questions.
trans-unit.target: Prepare a white-board. It can be either a physical whiteboard, a flip-chart, or a digital whiteboard (e.g. Miro board) where the participants can add their findings and questions.

trans-unit.source: Before starting the exercise, make sure everybody has installed QGIS and has downloaded __and unzipped__ the data folder.
trans-unit.target: Before starting the exercise, make sure everybody has installed QGIS and has downloaded __and unzipped__ the data folder.

trans-unit.source: Check out [How to do trainings?](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.html#how-to-do-trainings) for some general tips on training conduction
trans-unit.target: Check out [How to do trainings?](https://giscience.github.io/gis-training-resource-center/content/Trainers_corner/en_how_to_training.html#how-to-do-trainings) for some general tips on training conduction

trans-unit.source: Introduce the idea and aim of the exercise.
trans-unit.target: Introduce the idea and aim of the exercise.

trans-unit.source: Provide the download link and make sure everybody has unzipped the folder before beginning the tasks.
trans-unit.target: Provide the download link and make sure everybody has unzipped the folder before beginning the tasks.

trans-unit.source: Show and explain each step yourself at least twice and slow enough so everybody can see what you are doing, and follow along in their own QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: Show and explain each step yourself at least twice and slow enough so everybody can see what you are doing, and follow along in their own QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: Make sure that everybody is following along and doing the steps themselves by periodically asking if anybody needs help or if everybody is still following.
trans-unit.target: Make sure that everybody is following along and doing the steps themselves by periodically asking if anybody needs help or if everybody is still following.

trans-unit.source: Be open and patient to every question or problem that might come up. Your participants are essentially multitasking by paying attention to your instructions and orienting themselves in their own QGIS-project.
trans-unit.target: Be open and patient to every question or problem that might come up. Your participants are essentially multitasking by paying attention to your instructions and orienting themselves in their own QGIS-project.

trans-unit.source: Leave time for any issues or questions concerning the tasks at the end of the exercise.
trans-unit.target: Leave time for any issues or questions concerning the tasks at the end of the exercise.

trans-unit.source: Leave some time for open questions.
trans-unit.target: Leave some time for open questions.

trans-unit.source: __Download all datasets here, save the folder on your computer and unzip the file.__ :::
trans-unit.target: __Download all datasets here, save the folder on your computer and unzip the file.__ :::

trans-unit.source: After building her model to estimate exposed population, Aina wants to expand its usefulness. She decides to also **identify critical services** affected by cyclones — especially **health facilities** and **schools**.
trans-unit.target: After building her model to estimate exposed population, Aina wants to expand its usefulness. She decides to also **identify critical services** affected by cyclones — especially **health facilities** and **schools**.

trans-unit.source: Not only does she want to know *which* facilities are affected, but also *how many in total exist* per district. That way, she can calculate the **percentage of services affected** in each area.
trans-unit.target: Not only does she want to know *which* facilities are affected, but also *how many in total exist* per district. That way, she can calculate the **percentage of services affected** in each area.

trans-unit.source: To achieve this, she will use two point datasets from OpenStreetMap:
trans-unit.target: To achieve this, she will use two point datasets from OpenStreetMap:

trans-unit.source: **Load the health and education facilities datasets** First, let's have a look at the data we want to work with.
trans-unit.target: **Load the health and education facilities datasets** First, let's have a look at the data we want to work with.

trans-unit.source: Drag and drop the following layers into your QGIS project:
trans-unit.target: Drag and drop the following layers into your QGIS project:

trans-unit.source: Confirm that both layers are visible in the **Layers Panel**
trans-unit.target: Confirm that both layers are visible in the **Layers Panel**

trans-unit.source: **Save your model under a new name**
trans-unit.target: **Save your model under a new name**

trans-unit.source: Immediately save it under a new name:
trans-unit.target: Immediately save it under a new name:

trans-unit.source: Save it to the `project` folder as:
trans-unit.target: Save it to the `project` folder as:

trans-unit.source: Définir une nouvelle entrée de modèle : couche vectorielle de points représentant les établissements de santé ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Model Input: Education Facilities :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_education_facilities.PNG
trans-unit.target: Définir une nouvelle entrée de modèle : couche vectorielle de points représentant les établissements de santé ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Model Input: Education Facilities :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_model_input_education_facilities.PNG

trans-unit.source: Définir une nouvelle entrée de modèle : couche vectorielle de points représentant les établissements d'éducation ::: :::: ::::: 3. **Count All Health Facilities per Admin 2**
trans-unit.target: Définir une nouvelle entrée de modèle : couche vectorielle de points représentant les établissements d'éducation ::: :::: ::::: 3. **Count All Health Facilities per Admin 2**

trans-unit.source: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Count Points in Polygon**.
trans-unit.target: From the **Algorithms** panel, search for **Count Points in Polygon**.

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Comptez le nombre d'établissements de santé dans chaque district.`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Comptez le nombre d'établissements de santé dans chaque district.`

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l'opération : compter le nombre d'établissements de santé dans chaque district. ::: 4. **Count All Education Facilities per Admin 2**
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l'opération : compter le nombre d'établissements de santé dans chaque district. ::: 4. **Count All Education Facilities per Admin 2**

trans-unit.source: Add another **Count Points in Polygon** step.
trans-unit.target: Add another **Count Points in Polygon** step.

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Comptez le nombre d'établissements de education dans chaque district`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Comptez le nombre d'établissements de education dans chaque district`

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l'opération : compter le nombre d'établissements scolaires dans chaque district. ::: 5. **Intersect Health Facilities with Cyclone Buffer**
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l'opération : compter le nombre d'établissements scolaires dans chaque district. ::: 5. **Intersect Health Facilities with Cyclone Buffer**

trans-unit.source: **Overlay layer**: buffered cyclone zone (use “Reprojected to EPSG:4326” from **Algorithm Output**)
trans-unit.target: **Overlay layer**: buffered cyclone zone (use “Reprojected to EPSG:4326” from **Algorithm Output**)

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l'opération : intersecter les établissements de santé avec la zone d'impact du cyclone. ::: 6. **Intersect Education Facilities with Cyclone Buffer**
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l'opération : intersecter les établissements de santé avec la zone d'impact du cyclone. ::: 6. **Intersect Education Facilities with Cyclone Buffer**

trans-unit.source: **Overlay layer**: buffered cyclone zone (use “Reprojected to EPSG:4326” from **Algorithm Output**)
trans-unit.target: **Overlay layer**: buffered cyclone zone (use “Reprojected to EPSG:4326” from **Algorithm Output**)

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l'opération : intersecter les établissements de education avec la zone d'impact du cyclone. ::: 7. **Count Affected Health Facilities per Admin 2**
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l'opération : intersecter les établissements de education avec la zone d'impact du cyclone. ::: 7. **Count Affected Health Facilities per Admin 2**

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Compter les établissements de santé touchés par district`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Compter les établissements de santé touchés par district`

trans-unit.source: Add a description: Compter les établissements de santé touchés par district
trans-unit.target: Add a description: Compter les établissements de santé touchés par district

trans-unit.source: **Polygon layer**: Count total health facilities output
trans-unit.target: **Polygon layer**: Count total health facilities output

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l'opération : compter les établissements de santé touchés par district. ::: 8. **Count Affected Education Facilities per Admin 2**
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l'opération : compter les établissements de santé touchés par district. ::: 8. **Count Affected Education Facilities per Admin 2**

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Compter les établissements education touchés par district`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Compter les établissements education touchés par district`

trans-unit.source: **Polygon layer**: Count total education facilities output
trans-unit.target: **Polygon layer**: Count total education facilities output

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l'opération : compter les établissements de santé touchés par district. ::: 9. **Calculate percentage of affected Health Facilities** To compute the percentage of affected health sites per administrative area, we will use the **Field Calculator**:
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l'opération : compter les établissements de santé touchés par district. ::: 9. **Calculate percentage of affected Health Facilities** To compute the percentage of affected health sites per administrative area, we will use the **Field Calculator**:

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Calculer le pourcentage d’établissements de santé touchés par district`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Calculer le pourcentage d’établissements de santé touchés par district`

trans-unit.source: **Input layer**: the output of Count Affected Health Facilities per Admin 2
trans-unit.target: **Input layer**: the output of Count Affected Health Facilities per Admin 2

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l’opération : calculer le pourcentage d’établissements de santé touchés par district. ::: 10. **Calculate percentage of affected Education Facilities** To compute the percentage of affected education sites per administrative area, we will use the **Field Calculator**:
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l’opération : calculer le pourcentage d’établissements de santé touchés par district. ::: 10. **Calculate percentage of affected Education Facilities** To compute the percentage of affected education sites per administrative area, we will use the **Field Calculator**:

trans-unit.source: Add a description: `Calculer le pourcentage d’établissements d’éducation touchés par district`
trans-unit.target: Add a description: `Calculer le pourcentage d’établissements d’éducation touchés par district`

trans-unit.source: **Input layer**: the output of Count Affected Education Facilities per Admin 2
trans-unit.target: **Input layer**: the output of Count Affected Education Facilities per Admin 2

trans-unit.source: Configuration de l’opération : calculer le pourcentage d’établissements d’éducation touchés par district. ::: 11. **Validate and Save Your Extended Model**
trans-unit.target: Configuration de l’opération : calculer le pourcentage d’établissements d’éducation touchés par district. ::: 11. **Validate and Save Your Extended Model**

trans-unit.source: Click the ✔️ **Validate Model** button to check for errors.
trans-unit.target: Click the ✔️ **Validate Model** button to check for errors.

trans-unit.source: Click the ▶️ **Run** button in the top-right corner of the Graphical Modeler window.
trans-unit.target: Click the ▶️ **Run** button in the top-right corner of the Graphical Modeler window.

trans-unit.source: Click on the three dots for each input dataset and select the correct input:
trans-unit.target: Click on the three dots for each input dataset and select the correct input:

trans-unit.source: `Cyclone Track` → select the GeoJSON of the storm path (e.g. `Harald_2025_Track.geojson`)
trans-unit.target: `Cyclone Track` → select the GeoJSON of the storm path (e.g. `Harald_2025_Track.geojson`)

trans-unit.source: `Population Raster` → select the WorldPop raster file
trans-unit.target: `Population Raster` → select the WorldPop raster file

trans-unit.source: `Health Facilities` → select the point dataset for health sites
trans-unit.target: `Health Facilities` → select the point dataset for health sites

trans-unit.source: `Education Facilities` → select the point dataset for schools
trans-unit.target: `Education Facilities` → select the point dataset for schools

trans-unit.source: Save all output layers in the output folder and use the names below.
trans-unit.target: Save all output layers in the output folder and use the names below.

trans-unit.source: Click `Run` to execute the full model.
trans-unit.target: Click `Run` to execute the full model.

trans-unit.source: Vue d’ensemble du Modèle Graphique de la tâche 3 montrant tous les algorithmes connectés et les sorties définies. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Run Model Configuration :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task3_exposed_HF_EF_run_configurations.png
trans-unit.target: Vue d’ensemble du Modèle Graphique de la tâche 3 montrant tous les algorithmes connectés et les sorties définies. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Run Model Configuration :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task3_exposed_HF_EF_run_configurations.png

trans-unit.source: Configuration des paramètres pour exécuter le modèle de la tâche 3 avec toutes les couches d’entrée requises. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Model Output :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task3_exposed_HF_EF_model_results_AT.png
trans-unit.target: Configuration des paramètres pour exécuter le modèle de la tâche 3 avec toutes les couches d’entrée requises. ::: :::: ::::{tab-item} Model Output :::{figure} /fig/fr_MDG_AA_intermediate_result_model_algorythms_task3_exposed_HF_EF_model_results_AT.png

trans-unit.source: Résultats du modèle de la tâche 3 affichés dans QGIS, y compris les pourcentages d’établissements de santé et d’éducation touchés par district. ::: :::: :::::
trans-unit.target: Résultats du modèle de la tâche 3 affichés dans QGIS, y compris les pourcentages d’établissements de santé et d’éducation touchés par district. ::: :::: :::::
